name: Hampshire Mashed Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and quarter the potatoes.
2. Cook the potatoes in boiling salted water until they break apart when pierced with a fork.
3. Drain the liquid from the potatoes (reserve it for gravy if desired) and return the potatoes to low heat to dry any remaining moisture.
4. Add the sour cream into the bottom of the pan with the potatoes and allow it to heat.
5. Add butter.
6. Whip the potatoes with an electric mixer until light, smooth, and fluffy. Add additional salt if necessary.
Variation: Buttermilk Mashed Potatoes - Substitute 1/2 cup buttermilk for sour cream.
Serves: 4 - 6.
